MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Benjamin Humphreys, Esq. of Law Office of Richard Hurlburt (415-391-6495), attorney for plaintiff/opposing party
Charles S. Redfield, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch (415-981-6630), attorney for defendant/moving party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:

DEFENDANT ANNLIA HILL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to whether the Premises have been the principal place of residence for Ms. Hill and her husband since October 2012. (Fact #17). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
